Find your perfect job in Germany easily using Germany's major job board. Here you find all information. Here all the information you need: The Unemployment Benefit in Germany (Arbeitslosengeld I) has not to be confused with the “Basic Allowance” ( Arbeitslosengeld II). The first has to be requested at the Agentur für die Arbeit and the second at the Jobcenter. The Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit - BA) is the largest provider of labour market services in Germany. It has a network of more than 700 agencies and branch offices nationwide. Our most important tasks are job and training placement, career counselling and providing benefits replacing employment income such as unemployment benefit and insolvency payments. A Bildungsgutschein (BGS) is an educational voucher that you can obtain from the Agentur für Arbeit or Jobcenter when you are registered in Germany as unemployed. Access to the German labour market is determined by the provisions of the German Residence Act (AufenthG). For a residence for the purpose of gainful employment, the approval by the Federal Employment Agency (BA) is always required. What is a Bildungsgutschein and how do you apply for one in 2025? Learn everything you need to know in this guide. If you find yourself unemployed in Germany, you’ve probably heard of the Agentur für Arbeit —otherwise known as the Jobcenter. You may have also gotten wind of something called a Bildungsgutschein —or a training voucher. But what exactly is this training voucher? How can The Agentur für Arbeit can pay for professional courses, German lessons and career coaching. They will give you a Bildungsgutschein that pays for your training. All you have to know about live, study,work in Germany. All information for people from other countries. The Bundesagentur für Arbeit (BA for short, AA or Arbeitsagentur) (' Federal Employment Agency') is a German federal agency under the Federal Ministry for Labour and Social Affairs. The Bundesagentur für Arbeit, Germany's Federal Employment Agency, is in charge of this online portal, which is intended to assist people in locating and applying to a variety of educational and training opportunities around the nation. Want to know how to get an educational voucher in Germany? Here's how to apply for a Bildungsgutschein and learn new skills for free in 2025. We explain you all the requirements to get Unemployment Benefits ("Arbeitslosengeld") in Germany. Mission, services and organisation of the German Federal Employment Agency This guide will help you through the process of registering at the Jobcenter in Germany and clarify where to go for support. If you are eligible, unemployment benefits are provided by the Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit) to cover you while you look for a job. The amount you receive, and the duration, depends on how long you have been contributing and the salary you received before you became unemployed. Do you want to employ a skilled worker from abroad? The Federal Government's official portal explains the regulations for access to the German labour market. To address these challenges, the agency offers a range of specialized services aimed at facilitating the integration of foreign workers into the German labor force. Die Website rund ums Leben.
